remarks: Imagine an exquisite Federal-style townhouse born from an extraordinary collaboration between its owner and an award-winning builder. Imagine sitting on the home's expansive terrace, surrounded by gorgeous gardens and enjoying breathtaking, private views of New Canaan's most picturesque park and pond. Welcome to Richmond Mews.    This beautiful three-bedroom, three-bath residence features 9+ foot ceilings and oversized windows that flood the interiors with natural light. Relax in today's highly desirable open-concept family room and gourmet kitchen, while gracious living and dining rooms create an elegant setting for entertaining.    Whether working from home, enjoying 4th of July fireworks with friends right from your patio, hosting loved ones after the town's celebrated Memorial Day parade, or devouring your favorite novel, you'll appreciate the home's multiple flexible spaces, including charming library, office, and sitting rooms. The primary suite offers oversized walk-in closets, a luxurious bath, and a private office, while two additional spacious bedrooms provide lovely accommodations for family and guests.    And from virtually every room, delight in incomparable park views.   Just moments from top restaurants, fine shopping, and the train, this exceptional residence offers the very best of village living in one of New England's prettiest towns.
